languages.original_text: "I have pondered this a great deal — do death and terror define our existence from the very beginning? Like a kind of fate, a raised blade since our conception, that governs our lives. Rogue Trader, do you fear death?"

languages.text: "Я много размышлял об этом — неужели смерть и ужас определяют наше бытие с самого начала? Некий фатум, как клинок, занесенный с зачатия, который управляет нашей жизнью. {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольный Торговец{/g} — боитесь ли вы смерти?"

traits.locale_text: "Я много размышлял об этом — неужели смерть и ужас определяют наше бытие с самого начала? Некий фатум, как клинок, занесенный с зачатия, который управляет нашей жизнью. {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольный Торговец{/g} — боитесь ли вы смерти?"

traits.locale_text: "I have pondered this a great deal — do death and terror define our existence from the very beginning? Like a kind of fate, a raised blade since our conception, that governs our lives. {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}, do you fear death?"

"I have pondered this a great deal — do death and terror define our existence from the very beginning? Like a kind of fate, a raised blade since our conception, that governs our lives. Rogue Trader, do you fear death?"

"I have pondered this a great deal — do death and terror define our existence from the very beginning? Like a kind of fate, a raised blade since our conception, that governs our lives. Rogue Trader, do you fear death?"

languages.text: «He reflexionado mucho sobre esto: ¿definen la muerte y el terror nuestra existencia desde el principio? Como un destino, una espada al cuello desde nuestra concepción que gobierna nuestras vidas. {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante{/g}, ¿teme usted a la muerte?».
languages.original_text: "I have pondered this a great deal — do death and terror define our existence from the very beginning? Like a kind of fate, a raised blade since our conception, that governs our lives. {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}, do you fear death?"

traits.locale_text: «He reflexionado mucho sobre esto: ¿definen la muerte y el terror nuestra existencia desde el principio? Como un destino, una espada al cuello desde nuestra concepción que gobierna nuestras vidas. {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante{/g}, ¿teme usted a la muerte?».

languages.text: “我思考了很多——死亡与恐惧是否从一开始就定义了我们的存在？就像一种宿命，自生命萌芽的那一刻起，就有一把利刃悬在我们头顶，支配着我们的生活。{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}，您害怕死亡吗？”
languages.original_text: "I have pondered this a great deal — do death and terror define our existence from the very beginning? Like a kind of fate, a raised blade since our conception, that governs our lives. {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}, do you fear death?"

traits.locale_text: “我思考了很多——死亡与恐惧是否从一开始就定义了我们的存在？就像一种宿命，自生命萌芽的那一刻起，就有一把利刃悬在我们头顶，支配着我们的生活。{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}，您害怕死亡吗？”

languages.text: « Je repense souvent à cette idée : la mort et la terreur définissent-elles notre existence dès notre premier jour ? Un peu comme le sort, une lame dressée au-dessus de notre tête au moment même de notre conception, qui régit notre vie. Craignez-vous la mort, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}{/g} ? »
languages.original_text: "I have pondered this a great deal — do death and terror define our existence from the very beginning? Like a kind of fate, a raised blade since our conception, that governs our lives. {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}, do you fear death?"

traits.locale_text: « Je repense souvent à cette idée : la mort et la terreur définissent-elles notre existence dès notre premier jour ? Un peu comme le sort, une lame dressée au-dessus de notre tête au moment même de notre conception, qui régit notre vie. Craignez-vous la mort, {mf|{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}libre-marchand{/g}|libre-marchande} ? »

languages.text: "Ich habe lange darüber nachgedacht — definieren von Anfang an Tod und Entsetzen unsere Existenz? Als wären sie eine Bestimmung, eine über uns schwebende Klinge, die über unser Leben entscheidet. Habt Ihr Angst vor dem Tod, {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}{/g}?"
languages.original_text: "I have pondered this a great deal — do death and terror define our existence from the very beginning? Like a kind of fate, a raised blade since our conception, that governs our lives. {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}, do you fear death?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe lange darüber nachgedacht — definieren von Anfang an Tod und Entsetzen unsere Existenz? Als wären sie eine Bestimmung, eine über uns schwebende Klinge, die über unser Leben entscheidet. Habt Ihr Angst vor dem Tod, {mf|{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Freihändler{/g}|Freihändlerin}?"

languages.text: 「死と恐怖は、私たちの存在を最初から規定しているのだろうか？宿命のようなもの、受胎したときから掲げられた刃のようなものが、私たちの人生を支配している。ローグ・トレーダーよ、死を恐れるか？」
languages.original_text: "I have pondered this a great deal — do death and terror define our existence from the very beginning? Like a kind of fate, a raised blade since our conception, that governs our lives. {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}, do you fear death?"

traits.locale_text: 「死と恐怖は、私たちの存在を最初から規定しているのだろうか？宿命のようなもの、受胎したときから掲げられた刃のようなものが、私たちの人生を支配している。ローグ・トレーダーよ、死を恐れるか？」

languages.text: "Bunun üzerine çok düşündüm... Varoluşumuzu en başından beri ölüm ve dehşet mi belirliyor? Bizi var oluşumuzdan beri başımızın üzerinde sallanan ve hayatımızı yöneten bir kılıç misali bir tür kader gibi mi? {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir{/g}, ölümden korkar mısın?"
languages.original_text: "I have pondered this a great deal — do death and terror define our existence from the very beginning? Like a kind of fate, a raised blade since our conception, that governs our lives. {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}, do you fear death?"

traits.locale_text: "Bunun üzerine çok düşündüm... Varoluşumuzu en başından beri ölüm ve dehşet mi belirliyor? Bizi var oluşumuzdan beri başımızın üzerinde sallanan ve hayatımızı yöneten bir kılıç misali bir tür kader gibi mi? {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir{/g}, ölümden korkar mısın?"
